title: Kubb Plugin Registry
description: Schema for the aggregated Kubb plugin registry. Each entry extends the per-plugin schema with NPM-derived stats and timestamps.

plugins.description: Array of plugin metadata. Each entry is a per-plugin record extended with `stats`, `updated`, and `created`.

categories.description: Distinct plugin categories present in the registry.

registryPlugin.description: A plugin entry as it appears in the aggregated registry: the canonical plugin schema plus runtime-derived stats and publish timestamps.

updated.description: Publish date of the latest version on NPM (UTC ISO string).

created.description: Publish date of the first version on NPM (UTC ISO string).

stats.description: Runtime-derived metrics fetched from NPM and GitHub during registry generation.

stars.description: GitHub star count for the plugin's repository.

bundleSize.description: Unpacked package size in bytes (from the latest NPM version).
